description: Baseline compute breakdown of HunyuanVideo-1.5-Diffusers-480p_i2v at 832x480, 33 frames, 30 denoising steps, guidance_scale=6.0, flow_shift=5.0 on 1x A100 80GB (single GPU, TP=1). Values averaged across Run 1 and Run 2 which agreed to within 0.5s.
headline: DiT denoising dominates at ~89% of inference time; VAE decode is ~9%; text encoder and VAE encode are negligible. KV-cache-for-DiT and blockwise-causal attention are directly on the critical path; VAE tiling is a meaningful but secondary optimization.
notes: Stage timings scraped from container stderr (--enable-diffusion-pipeline-profiler). The stage_durations field in the API response body is always empty; there is a broken link between HunyuanVideo15I2VPipeline._stage_durations and VideoGenerationArtifacts.stage_durations -- this is a real vllm-omni bug and a potential small contribution.
The pipeline's 'forward' metric wraps the entire __call__ including VAE and text encoder sub-calls; DiT denoising time is derived as forward - text_encoder - vae_encode - vae_decode.

Server warmup (run_0) is excluded; it had forward=36.84s and vae.decode=0.141s which are clearly not representative of a steady-state inference at 30 steps. Likely a startup validation with a different config.
